Name: ArenaParam
Description: Determines the parameters used for Arena missions.

Fields.Name: Mission Param ID
Fields.Description: MissionParam row ID; mainly determines which map to fight on.

Fields.Name: Rank Text ID
Fields.Description: Menu text ID for rank display

Fields.Name: Account Param ID
Fields.Description: AccountParam row ID; opponent's name and emblem.

Fields.Name: Character Param ID
Fields.Description: CharaInitParam row ID; opponent's loadout and customization.

Fields.Name: Initial OST Reward
Fields.Description: OS Tuning reward granted on first completion.

Fields.Name: Repeat OST Reward
Fields.Description: OS Tuning reward granted on repeat completions.

Fields.Name: Intro Cutscene ID
Fields.Description: Cutscene ID to play at the start of the mission.

Fields.Name: BGM Sound ID
Fields.Description: Background music to play during the mission.

Fields.Name: Rank Texture ID
Fields.Description: Texture ID defined in the SB_ArenaRank layout.

Fields.Name: Outro Cutscene ID
Fields.Description: Cutscene ID to play at the end of the mission.
